11.text: 'THIS IS THE MENS ROOM. A MAN WALKS UP TO YOU AND SPEAKS..' RETURN

15.text: "MR. FREDRICKSON LOOKS UP. 'IT TOOK SOME TIME FOR YOUR FILES TO BE TRANSFERRED FROM SALVATION. FOR NOW, HERE ARE LEVEL 1 SECURITY PASSES. I'LL GET YOU BETTER ONES WHEN THE PAPERWORK COMES THROUGH."

16.text: 'ZACHARY IS HERE PROTECTED BY A RAM INFILTRATION TEAM.'

17.text: 'THERE IS A COMPUTER HERE. DO YOU ATTEMPT TO USE IT?'

22.text: "A GUARD APPROACHES. 'OUR SENSORS HAVE DETECTED UNUSUAL MAGNETIC READINGS FROM THE BASEMENT. THEY MAY BE INVOLVED IN YOUR INVESTIGATION. PLEASE KEEP THE DIRECTOR INFORMED OF ANY PROGRESS.'"

23.text: 'AIRLOCK 1 IS BEFORE YOU.' 'THIS IS A CREW CABIN.'

27.text: 'YOU SPOT THE SPY THAT ESCAPED! HE AND OTHERS ATTACK!'

33.text: "THE SECURITY CHIEF GREETS YOU. 'ONE OF MY MEN NOTED SOMEONE SUSPICIOUS ON THE CABIN LEVEL, BUT HE LOST THE MAN. YOU MIGHT WANT TO FOLLOW UP.'"

38.text: 'THERE IS A LOT OF JUNK HERE. DO YOU WISH TO SEARCH?'

1.text: 'AN ELEVATOR GOING DOWN. DO YOU USE IT?'

20.text: "YOU HEAR HANIBL SOOTH'S VOICE TO THE EAST!"
